data.title: test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh: stale header comment says all 5 tests RED after all 7 pass GREEN
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The test file header comment (lines 12-16) says 'ALL 5 tests are RED — no bug-fix mode exists in current SKILL.md' but as of bug 774d-4866 fix, all 7 tests pass GREEN. The stale comment misleads future readers about the test status.
File: tests/scripts/test-debug-everything-bug-fix-mode.sh
Category: maintainability
